---
title: "istream — Input stream helper"
---

The `istream` helper provides a growable input buffer with delimiter- and
length-based parsing primitives. It is used by protocol GClasses
(`c_prot_*`) to assemble incoming bytes into framed messages without
blocking the event loop.

## Lifecycle

| Function | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [`istream_create()`](istream_create.qmd) | Allocate a new stream |
| [`istream_destroy()`](istream_destroy.qmd) | Free a stream |
| [`ISTREAM_CREATE`](ISTREAM_CREATE.qmd) | Convenience macro |
| [`ISTREAM_DESTROY`](ISTREAM_DESTROY.qmd) | Convenience macro |

## Reading

| Function | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [`istream_read_until_delimiter()`](istream_read_until_delimiter.qmd) | Read until a delimiter byte sequence |
| [`istream_read_until_num_bytes()`](istream_read_until_num_bytes.qmd) | Read a fixed number of bytes |
| [`istream_extract_matched_data()`](istream_extract_matched_data.qmd) | Consume matched data |
| [`istream_is_completed()`](istream_is_completed.qmd) | Check whether the current read has finished |

## Inspection & state

| Function | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [`istream_length()`](istream_length.qmd) | Unread byte count |
| [`istream_cur_rd_pointer()`](istream_cur_rd_pointer.qmd) | Current read pointer |
| [`istream_get_gbuffer()`](istream_get_gbuffer.qmd) | Access the backing gbuffer |
| [`istream_pop_gbuffer()`](istream_pop_gbuffer.qmd) | Detach the backing gbuffer |
| [`istream_new_gbuffer()`](istream_new_gbuffer.qmd) | Replace the backing gbuffer |
| [`istream_clear()`](istream_clear.qmd) | Clear stream contents |
| [`istream_consume()`](istream_consume.qmd) | Advance the read pointer |
| [`istream_reset_rd()`](istream_reset_rd.qmd) | Reset read pointer |
| [`istream_reset_wr()`](istream_reset_wr.qmd) | Reset write pointer |
